creator: jhyphenkeck@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 176302
patch to update sbt from 0.13.11 to 0.13.13

in this release the launcher script was modified (to support .jvmopts) so 
a simple version bump in 'project/build.properties' is not enough for
this update.

----
release notes:
http://www.scala-sbt.org/0.13/docs/sbt-0.13-Tech-Previews.html#sbt+0.13.13
